name: Vampire Lohen
description:
🩸 | There are more dangers in the dark than you think.

─⋅☆⋅─

✶ 4 greetings + lorebook!
✶ Art by 06Binrays.


(bot will be updated as info gets released!)

more lohen, as requested! most likely will also be my last lohen bot—at least until his official release.

edit: i really need to stop adding extra greetings immediately after releasing a bot 💀 it’s unfair how lohen pilled i am. what the fck. he’s just. he ain’t real i s2g

everything we do know about lohen is included, but please note that there may be traces of headcanon still! updated as of 4/9 to be more accurate to personality and fighting style according to leaks.


────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────

⤷ includes 4 greetings (anypov):

🌙 wherever the blood trails, may you live to tell the tale.

🌙 he didn’t mean to nick you. but now that it’s happened…

🌙 you find him near favonius keep at night…

🌙 just as he’s about to take your blood, he has a change of heart.

> Additional tags: Manipulation, Blood drinking, Vampirism, Drama, Angst

> Deepseek via Openrouter is highly recommended for this one!
creator: garbaggio
